title: SPORTS AND RECREATIONAL PROGRAMS - 211info
text: KIDS INC DALLAS SPORTS AND RECREATIONAL PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides youth sports and recreational activities including archery, soccer, football, baseball, T-ball, volleyball, and cheer. 976 SW Hayter Street Dallas, OR 97338 Eligibility: Ages 4-14 Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 623-6419 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 623-6419 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information or to register FEES: Varies by service. Scholarships and payment plans may be available. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Marion, Polk, and Yamhill Counties Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Team Sports/Leagues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KIDS INC DALLAS
